dining.description: Explore the rich culinary world at Hanoi Hotel, where our restaurants serve a variety of Cantonese, Hong Kong dishes, and especially the renowned Dimsum. Come and enjoy the unique flavors of culinary masterpieces in an elegant space in the heart of the capital.

gallery.title: Explore a visual journey of elegance, comfort, and timeless beauty.

conference.title: Host your events in sophisticated spaces, where impeccable service and sophistication converge.
conference.description: Hanoi Hotel offers conference and meeting room facilities that can accommodate up to 100 guests. Each room has contemporary equipment, and our dedicated staff is ready to serve you – whether you are holding an important business conference, a wedding party, or a festive family banquet
equipments: Large screen with a laser pointer

offer.title: Discover exclusive experiences that elevate your stay with unmatched opulent and exceptional value.
offer.description: Situated in the capital’s central district, Hanoi Hotel offers contemporary and elegant accommodations by the peaceful Giang Vo Lake, featuring diverse room types to suit various demands of travel purposes. Experience a range of attractive offerings at Hanoi Hotel!

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.description: Hanoi Hotel provides exceptional facilities to make your stay unforgettable. Stay fit in our modern gym, relax with rejuvenating spa treatments, and indulge in delicious cuisine at our on-site restaurant. Host events in versatile spaces, access business support, and enjoy 24/7 concierge services, complimentary Wi-Fi, and convenient airport transfers, ensuring comfort and convenience throughout your visit.

overview.title: Welcome to Hanoi Hotel
overview.description: Hanoi Hotel has a great heritage of being the first international hotel in Hanoi. With 218 rooms and suites overlooking the scenic Giang Vo Lake, the centrally-located hotel is the perfect place for business or leisure purposes. Luxurious accommodations are elegantly furnished and equipped with a wide range of high-end amenities. Hanoi Hotel is renowned for its comprehensive evening entertainment range and the city’s finest Cantonese cuisine. Hanoi Hotel guarantees that your stay here will be pleasant and memorable.
